title: Switzerland's Unbeaten Run Against Algeria
desc: Switzerland are unbeaten in their last 6 meetings with Algeria across all competitions, with 4 wins and 2 draws. The last Algerian victory dates back to 1996, which turns this fixture into a record watch as much as a group-stage opener. Across those 6 matches, Switzerland have scored 14 goals and conceded just 3, but the sharper pattern is timing: they scored first in 5 of the 6 and never dropped points once ahead. Algeria's stake is clear. Break the 28-year sequence and the group changes immediately; concede first, and history says the match starts to tilt hard toward Switzerland's control.

title: Morocco's Golden Generation Meets Its Test
desc: This Morocco squad carries the weight of a nation's belief after their historic 2022 World Cup semi-final run. But here's the stat that matters: Morocco have won just 2 of their last 9 matches against European opposition, and both wins came against the same team, Belgium. For the first time, they enter a major tournament not as underdogs but as contenders. The question is not talent; it is whether this group can handle the shift from hunter to hunted. Portugal, meanwhile, have everything to lose. A squad this deep, with this much individual quality, reaching the knockout stage is the minimum acceptable result.

title: Portugal's Knockout Floor Raises the Stakes
desc: Portugal arrive with a squad built for the late stages, not survival math. Across their last 10 competitive tournament matches, they have reached extra-time or penalties 4 times, a pattern that turns squad depth into a decisive edge. Morocco's route is different: their 2022 semi-final run proved they can defend long phases without losing structure, but Portugal's bench changes the calculation. If this match stays level after 70 minutes, Portugal can add fresh creators without changing the spine of the side. For Morocco, the milestone is larger than one result: another win over European opposition would turn their 2022 run from a historic spike into a repeatable tournament identity.
